minimal.description: Low-noise daily engineering profile with plan pressure testing, runtime diagnosis, throwaway prototyping, structured code review, HTML interaction artifacts, session handoff, quality, TDD, verification, security, docs lookup, and self-debugging.

sdd.description: SDD-first workflow profile with intent routing, public workflow owners, source gathering, embedded TDD, review, validation, delivery handoffs, and an explicit Ralph goal-loop bridge.

web.description: Frontend, UI prototyping, and browser-validation profile for web UI work.

openspec-formal.description: Formal OpenSpec lifecycle profile for explicit change proposals, implementation tasks, and archiving.

ralph.description: Ralph PRD and autonomous iteration helpers. Use only when the user explicitly wants Ralph-style repeated execution.

learning.description: Explicit learning-coach profile for Feynman-style tutoring, teach-back checks, and durable learning logs.

harness.description: Agent harness environment profile that installs root AGENTS.md plus state, verification, handoff, and quality templates under harness/.

harness:agents-md.routing: Install when a target repository needs root agent instructions for a full harness environment.
harness:agents-md.recommendation: Add root AGENTS.md instructions that route agents through the harness startup, scope, verification, and wrap-up workflow.

harness:readme.routing: Install when a target repository needs a map for harness state, verification, and handoff files.
harness:readme.recommendation: Add a concise guide explaining the installed harness files and status rules.

harness:init-script.routing: Install when a target repository needs one standard command for dependency sync, baseline verification, and startup hints.
harness:init-script.recommendation: Add a single initialization script that agents can run before feature work.

harness:feature-list.routing: Install when a target repository needs machine-readable task boundaries and evidence-backed feature status.
harness:feature-list.recommendation: Add a feature list that keeps scope, status, verification steps, and evidence in one machine-readable file.

harness:progress-log.routing: Install when a target repository needs persistent progress across agent sessions.
harness:progress-log.recommendation: Add a progress log for current verified state, blockers, evidence, and next actions.

harness:session-handoff.routing: Install when a target repository needs explicit handoff notes for long or interrupted agent sessions.
harness:session-handoff.recommendation: Add a handoff template so the next session can continue from verified facts instead of chat memory.

harness:clean-state-checklist.routing: Install when a target repository needs a concrete wrap-up checklist before agent sessions end.
harness:clean-state-checklist.recommendation: Add a clean-state checklist that blocks premature completion and unsafe handoff.

harness:evaluator-rubric.routing: Install when a target repository needs a simple rubric for reviewing completed agent work.
harness:evaluator-rubric.recommendation: Add a review rubric for correctness, verification, scope discipline, reliability, maintainability, and handoff readiness.

harness:quality-document.routing: Install when a target repository needs periodic snapshots of product, architecture, and harness quality.
harness:quality-document.recommendation: Add a quality snapshot that tracks whether the codebase and harness are getting stronger over time.

skill:workflow-router.routing: Load when a non-trivial request needs intent recognition before work starts; classify it into exactly one workflow owner or ask a clarification.
skill:workflow-router.recommendation: Add a thin intent router that selects exactly one public workflow owner before work starts.

skill:answer-workflow.routing: Use for read-only questions, explanations, evidence lookup, feasibility checks, and comparisons.
skill:answer-workflow.recommendation: Answer read-only questions from evidence without mutating files.

skill:sdd-workflow.routing: Use for feature, bug fix, refactor, product/spec change, or implementation requests that must align spec and acceptance before coding.
skill:sdd-workflow.recommendation: Run the full SDD lifecycle with source gathering, spec, acceptance, executable plan, cleanup, implementation, tests, and handoff.

skill:diagnosis-workflow.routing: Use when a task starts from a failing command, runtime bug, flaky behavior, performance regression, or agent/tool failure.
skill:diagnosis-workflow.recommendation: Reproduce or bound a failure before applying the smallest confirmed fix.

skill:review-workflow.routing: Use for code, plan, release, UI, or security review when findings should come before implementation.
skill:review-workflow.recommendation: Review with findings first and avoid implementing fixes unless explicitly redirected.

skill:delivery-workflow.routing: Use when accepted work needs validation closeout, cleanup, handoff, release notes, or local environment reset.
skill:delivery-workflow.recommendation: Close accepted work with validation, cleanup, residual-risk notes, and handoff.

skill:hub-maintenance-workflow.routing: Use for maintaining Skill Hub sources, routing, profiles, capabilities, npm lifecycle, and managed update/remove behavior.
skill:hub-maintenance-workflow.recommendation: Maintain Skill Hub with source evidence, narrow changes, validation, and lock-backed lifecycle boundaries.

skill:product-capability.routing: Use under SDD when product intent needs constraints, invariants, interfaces, unresolved decisions, and acceptance boundaries before implementation.
skill:product-capability.recommendation: Create an implementation-ready capability contract before coding product-facing changes.

skill:grill-me.routing: Use when the user asks to be grilled, challenged, pressure-tested, or wants assumptions surfaced before implementation.
skill:grill-me.recommendation: Use when the user asks to be grilled, challenged, pressure-tested, or wants assumptions surfaced before implementation.

skill:diagnose.routing: Use for product, code, test, and performance failures; use agent-introspection-debugging for agent/tool failures, webapp-testing for one-off browser inspection, and verification-loop after the fix.
skill:diagnose.recommendation: Use for product, code, test, and performance failures; use agent-introspection-debugging for agent/tool failures, webapp-testing for one-off browser inspection, and verification-loop after the fix.

skill:prototype.routing: Use only for clearly marked throwaway prototypes that answer one design question; use frontend-design for production UI, web-artifacts-builder for standalone artifacts, and tdd-workflow for production implementation.
skill:prototype.recommendation: Use only for clearly marked throwaway prototypes that answer one design question; use frontend-design for production UI, web-artifacts-builder for standalone artifacts, and tdd-workflow for production implementation.

skill:effective-interact.routing: Load broadly for non-trivial sessions when a generated, validated self-contained HTML surface can make planning, implementation progress, review, research, architecture, validation, status, or handoff clearer than chat; default-consider every session and require an HTML report after material repo or skill changes; skip permission pauses, trivial chat, UI apps, decks, and bundled artifacts.
skill:effective-interact.recommendation: Create visual self-contained HTML interaction artifacts for non-trivial alignment points, handoffs, option comparisons, reviews, plans, status dashboards, research explainers, architecture walkthroughs, or lightweight export editors.

skill:handoff.routing: Use when the user asks to hand off current work, compact this conversation for another agent/session, or create restart notes; use effective-interact for visual HTML repo reports.
skill:handoff.recommendation: Create concise restart notes in the OS temp directory so another agent or later session can continue from verified facts.

skill:compound-code-review.routing: Use for deep pre-PR or CE-style code review. Use security-review for focused security checklists, web-design-guidelines for UI/UX audits, and verification-loop for final command gates.
skill:compound-code-review.recommendation: Use for deep pre-PR or CE-style code review. Use security-review for focused security checklists, web-design-guidelines for UI/UX audits, and verification-loop for final command gates.

skill:feynman-learning-coach.routing: Load when the user explicitly wants to learn, study, master, review, prepare for an exam/interview, build a syllabus, or be coached through a topic; do not route ordinary implementation or factual lookup.
skill:feynman-learning-coach.recommendation: Use for explicit learning sessions with scoped teaching, Feynman teach-back checks, and durable logs.

skill:tdd-workflow.routing: Use for production features, confirmed bug fixes, and refactors that should proceed one behavior at a time through red-green-refactor; use diagnose for unknown root causes and prototype for throwaway exploration.
skill:tdd-workflow.recommendation: Drive production changes one behavior at a time through public behavior tests, minimal implementation, and refactor-after-green.

skill:security-review.routing: Security-sensitive code, auth, secrets, injection, unsafe IO, or payments.
skill:security-review.recommendation: Security-sensitive code, auth, secrets, injection, unsafe IO, or payments.

skill:documentation-lookup.routing: Library, framework, SDK, API, CLI, or cloud-service docs.
skill:documentation-lookup.recommendation: Library, framework, SDK, API, CLI, or cloud-service docs.

skill:agent-introspection-debugging.routing: Repeated agent failures, loops, drift, or recoverable tool failures.
skill:agent-introspection-debugging.recommendation: Repeated agent failures, loops, drift, or recoverable tool failures.

skill:frontend-design.routing: Use for polished product UI or web pages, not routine interaction artifacts.
skill:frontend-design.recommendation: Use for polished product UI or web pages, not routine interaction artifacts.

skill:frontend-slides.routing: Use for slide decks and PPT/PPTX-to-web work.
skill:frontend-slides.recommendation: Use for slide decks and PPT/PPTX-to-web work.

skill:frontend-patterns.routing: Use for React, state, forms, routing, and accessibility patterns.
skill:frontend-patterns.recommendation: Use for React, state, forms, routing, and accessibility patterns.

skill:e2e-testing.routing: Durable E2E suites and CI browser tests.
skill:e2e-testing.recommendation: Durable E2E suites and CI browser tests.

skill:openspec-explore.routing: Explicit OpenSpec exploration or formal change lifecycle only.
skill:openspec-explore.recommendation: Explicit OpenSpec exploration or formal change lifecycle only.

skill:ralph-prd.routing: Use when the user explicitly wants Ralph-ready PRDs.
skill:ralph-prd.recommendation: Use when the user explicitly wants Ralph-ready PRDs.

skill:ralph-loop.routing: Use only for explicit Ralph-style repeated execution.
skill:ralph-loop.recommendation: Use only for explicit Ralph-style repeated execution.
